title: epipactis atrorubens var. dilatata
intro: Epipactis atrorubens var. dilatata, also known as the purple helleborine, is a rare and exotic orchid species native to Europe. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is used to treat various health conditions. The purple helleborine is said to have anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antibacterial properties, which can help to alleviate symptoms of fever, respiratory issues, and skin infections. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions that can be used to promote digestion, boost the immune system, and even reduce stress and anxiety levels.
